name: unharness
description: >- Remove Citadel from a project. Exports valuable state (campaigns, postmortems, research, backlog, discoveries) to docs/citadel/ as human-readable markdown, then removes all harness files and hooks. The archive is detected by /do setup on re-install and offered for restore.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一款帮你安全卸载Citadel的工具，解决直接删除会丢失核心数据的问题。它能将重要状态导出为文档并清理残留文件，还支持重装时一键恢复。
